data.body: Some execution_plan knots appear with work_sdlc and ready_for_planning semantics after type conversion or adjacent defaulting paths. Trace every path that assigns type, workflow, profile, and initial state for execution_plan knots, identify why a work root can stick, and decide whether we need a migration or repair command for already mis-rooted knots.
data.title: Investigate execution_plan knots inheriting work workflow roots
